name: growmax
description: Shared Claude Code skills for the Growmax team.

plugins.name: growmax-skills
plugins.description: Growmax team skills + workflows bundle. github-repo-analyzer: turn any GitHub repo into a short briefing plus a two-part 'safe to use?' verdict (license + Trivy security scan). e2e-flow: gated multi-agent E2E test generation for web (Playwright) and api (Jest/supertest) surfaces — discover a flow, approve the intent, plan against the real repo, write one spec, self-heal to green or flag a real app bug, review; enforces tenant-isolation, teardown, and DB-write safety.
